input: SELECT o.__id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e JOIN objects t ON e.target_id = t.__global_id WHERE t.__id = o.__id) as incoming_refs FROM objects o WHERE o.__kind = 'Feature' ORDER BY o.__id
expected: SELECT o.__id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edges e INNER JOIN objects t ON e.target_id = t.__global_id AND t.__workspace = 'ws2' WHERE t.__id = o.__id AND e.__workspace = 'ws2') AS incoming_refs FROM objects o WHERE o.__kind = 'Feature' AND o.__workspace = 'ws2' ORDER BY o.__id ASC
